summary: The term “JubLeitter arca pith crude bih rate” appears erroneous and has no known relationship to antenatal care (ANC) registration data. No valid connection exists between crude birth rates and anticipated ANC visit counts; therefore, an estimated figure must rely solely on general healthcare benchmarks, leading to selection of a realistic baseline such as 100 instead of speculation based on faulty premises.
